name: Petrus Resources Ltd
message: Petrus Resources Ltd. is a Canadian energy company active in property exploitation, strategic acquisitions and risk-managed exploration in the western province of Alberta. The company has an extensive inventory of low risk oil and natural gas development assets in its Ferrier, North Ferrier and Thorsby operating areas. Petrus has an experienced  management team and board of directors with a strong track record of shareholder value creation. The company is return-driven and focused on delivering per share growth in cash flow, production and reserves.
